methods.name: registerWithListing
methods.desc:
Register the calling account as an agent with a service listing.
listingData: UTF-8 JSON bytes — { sellerName, service, description }
price:       listing price in microALGO
typeCode:    0–4 listing type code

methods.name: updateListing
methods.desc: Update a registered agent's listing. Only the agent themselves can call this.

methods.name: submitFeedback
methods.desc:
Submit a reputation score (0–100) for a registered agent.
Can be called by any account except the agent themselves.

agents.desc: Fixed-size profile: reputation + numeric listing fields

listings.desc: Variable-size listing metadata: JSON bytes — { sellerName, service, description }

sourceInfo.errorMessage: OnCompletion must be DeleteApplication && can only call when not creating
assert target is match for conditions
invalid number of bytes for arc4.dynamic_array<arc4.uint8>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 32>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
